news.title: Andreessen Horowitz Is Playing Politics Like No Other
news.snippet: “If you think there’s a lot of money in politics now,” Marc Andreessen said in 2000, “you haven’t seen anything yet.” His firm is now the biggest known spender on this campaign cycle.

news.title: Silicon Valley’s A.I. Lobbying Blitz Reaches a Fever Pitch
news.snippet: OpenAI and Anthropic are opening offices in Washington, hiring lobbyists and spending more than ever to win over federal lawmakers.

news.title: Anduril Raises $5 Billion in Funding and Is Valued at $61 Billion
news.snippet: The start-up, which makes A.I.-backed weapons, was valued at $61 billion in the financing round, double what it was a year ago.

news.title: A Start-Up Aiming to Make Geothermal Energy Mainstream Goes Public
news.snippet: Fervo Energy, which uses drilling techniques from the oil and gas industry to produce power from the earth’s heat, raised $1.9 billion in an initial public offering.

news.title: Notable Researchers Join $4 Billion Effort to Build Self-Improving A.I.
news.snippet: Recursive Superintelligence, founded by former Google, Meta and OpenAI researchers, is part of a growing effort to automate the creation of artificial intelligence.

news.title: Nvidia C.E.O. Jensen Huang Hitches Ride With Trump to China After Last-Minute Invite
news.snippet: Jensen Huang boarded Air Force One in Alaska, joining a delegation of more than a dozen business leaders accompanying President Trump on his trip to Beijing.

news.title: Anthropic in Talks to Raise Funding at a $950 Billion Valuation
news.snippet: The start-up, which recently released a powerful A.I. model called Mythos and is separately battling with the Pentagon, was previously valued at $380 billion.

news.title: Musk Lawyer’s Question for Sam Altman on the Stand: Are You Trustworthy?
news.snippet: Mr. Altman, the C.E.O. of OpenAI, said on Tuesday that he worried Elon Musk wanted control of the A.I. lab.

news.title: Sam Altman has been targeted in a backlash against A.I.
Is Anthropic’s Claude Mythos Really a Cybersecurity Risk?
news.snippet: Anthropic said that Claude Mythos was too dangerous to release to the public. That claim has reopened an old debate over cybersecurity.

news.title: WhatsApp launches totally private 'incognito' conversations with its AI chatbot
news.snippet: A cyber security expert says deleting chat history could lead to a lack of accountability if things go wrong.

news.title: Suicide forum fined £950,000 for not blocking UK users
news.snippet: The regulator said the forum had not done enough to protect UK users - but critics accuse Ofcom of acting too slowly.

news.title: Elon Musk said control of OpenAI should go to his children, Sam Altman tells jury
news.snippet: Sam Altman said Elon Musk tried many times for total control of OpenAI, which he's now suing.

news.title: Tech Life
news.snippet: Crumbling roads and other hazards - can AI make our streets safer?

news.title: Everyone at the Musk v. Altman Trial Is Using Fancy Butt Cushions
news.snippet: The plaintiffs and defense have rested their cases, as well as their rear ends.

news.title: What It Will Take to Make AI Sustainable
news.snippet: Researcher Sasha Luccioni argues we need better emissions data and a better sense of how people are using AI in the first place.

news.title: DHS Plans Experiment Running ‘Reconnaissance’ Drones Along the US-Canada Border
news.snippet: Autonomous drones and ground vehicles will stream “battlefield intelligence” over 5G along the US-Canada border in a bilateral DHS experiment this fall.

news.title: Overworked AI Agents Turn Marxist, Researchers Find
news.snippet: In a recent experiment, mistreated AI agents started grumbling about inequality and calling for collective bargaining rights.

news.title: OpenAI Brings Its Ass to Court
news.snippet: In Musk v. Altman, the company claimed a remarkable trophy was physical proof of Elon Musk’s concerning behavior.

news.title: WhatsApp Adds Meta AI Chats That Are Built to Be Fully Private
news.snippet: The company says its new Incognito Chat allows you to use its AI chatbot without anyone else—including Meta—being able to access your conversations.

news.title: Best Air Purifiers (2026): Coway, AirDoctor, IQAir, and More
news.snippet: Protect your home against dust, pets, allergies, and more with the best air purifiers, tested firsthand.

news.title: Submit Your Questions: AI Is Changing Your Job—Now What?
news.snippet: Pose your questions ahead of our May 27 livestream AMA, where a panel of WIRED experts will discuss how AI is transforming work.

news.title: A Conspiracy Theory About QR Codes Has Led to Chaos Ahead of Georgia’s Midterms
news.snippet: The state of Georgia banned the use of QR codes for elections, based in part on the assertions of a man who’s boosted false claims about Israel and 9/11. Now no one knows how ballots will be counted.

news.title: Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents
news.snippet: Notion’s new developer platform lets teams connect AI agents, external data sources, and custom code directly into their workspace as the company pushes deeper into agentic productivity software.

news.title: Musk’s xAI is running nearly 50 gas turbines unchecked at its Mississippi data center
news.snippet: Gas turbines at xAI's Colossus 2 data center have drawn a lawsuit over the company's use of "mobile" gas turbines as power plants.

news.title: Anthropic’s Cat Wu says that, in the future, AI will anticipate your needs before you know what they are
news.snippet: The head of product for Claude Code and Cowork says that the next big step for AI is proactivity.

news.title: Geothermal startup Fervo Energy pops 33% in IPO debut fueled by AI data center demand
news.snippet: Fervo Energy's IPO was upsized several times after potential investors asked why the enhanced geothermal startup wasn't raising more money.

news.title: Instagram’s new ‘Instants’ feature combines elements from Snapchat and BeReal
news.snippet: The feature lets users share disappearing photos with their close friends or mutual followers that can be viewed only once and remain available for 24 hours.

news.title: Rivian spinoff Mind Robotics raises another $400M
news.snippet: Mind Robotics, which was first revealed in late 2025, has now raised more than $1 billion to date.

news.title: Origin Lab raises $8M to help video game companies sell data to world-model builders
news.snippet: Origin Lab will serve as a marketplace where AI labs can buy high-quality licensed data, and video-game companies can sell it.

news.title: Anthropic courts a new kind of customer: small business owners

news.title: Ransomware hackers claim breach at Foxconn, a major electronics manufacturer for Apple, Google, and Nvidia
news.snippet: A ransomware group has claimed responsibility for hacking the electronics manufacturing giant Foxconn and is attempting to extort the company.

news.title: Amazon launches an AI shopping assistant for the search bar, powered by Alexa+
news.snippet: Alexa for Shopping offers a voice- and touch-enabled shopping experience across mobile, desktop, and Echo Show smart displays. Alexa for Shopping provides more personalized recommendations and automat

news.title: Anduril raises $5B, doubles valuation to $61B
news.snippet: After achieving $2.2 billion in revenue in 2025, the defense tech startup has raised another massive round, led by Thrive and a16z, it says.

news.title: r/WallStreetBets really hates the SEC’s proposal to weaken quarterly reporting
news.snippet: The retail trading subreddit submitted the sharpest criticism yet of the financial regulator's idea of letting companies report twice per year.

news.title: 36氪首发 | 清华系光计算芯片企业完成数千万天使轮融资，瞄准全波光计算架构
news.snippet:
作者 | 乔钰杰
  编辑 | 袁斯来
  硬氪获悉，近日，光子芯力（北京）科技有限公司（以下简称“光子芯力”）宣布完成数千万元天使轮融资，由苏州芯阳基金、驰星创投、盛景嘉成联合领投，开源创投跟投。
  光子芯力成立于2024年，总部位于北京，是一家专注于光电融合计算芯片的硬科技初创公司。公司创始人杨其晟博士毕

news.title: 深耕“具身智能+建筑大模型”底座，重构万亿建筑业，「方石机器人」完成近亿元A轮融资 | 36氪首发
news.snippet: 36氪获悉，智能建造机器人本体开发商北京方石机器人有限公司（下称「方石机器人」）近期宣布完成近亿元A轮融资，由北京科创亦庄直投基金、航发基金等机构联合投资。资金将主要用于核心产品的研发迭代投入、批量化生产交付能力建设以及海外市场体系布局。

news.title: 联发科技×阶跃星辰，音乐大模型可视化部署，AI适配效率迎来质的飞跃
news.snippet: 5月13日，联发科技在天玑开发者大会MDDC 2026上发布了天玑AI开发套件3.0，并展示了将阶跃星辰ACE-Step 音乐模型通过端侧可视化部署到天玑9500平台上，大幅度提升了模型及算法的移植效率

news.title: “收钱”Skill来了！度小满发布 ClawPay
news.snippet: 5月13日，在Create 2026百度AI开发者大会上，度小满发布了面向AI Skill开发者的支付解决方案“度小满ClawPay”。该产品将计费、下单、支付唤起等能力封装为标准化技术服务，帮助开发者零代码完成支付模块嵌入，打通从技术开发到商业变现的“最后一公里”。

news.title: 阿里云外部收入增长40%创新高，AI收入占比首破30%
news.snippet: 5月13日，阿里巴巴集团发布最新季度业绩。截至2026年3月31日止季度，阿里云收入同比增长38%至416.26亿元，剔除阿里巴巴并表业务后的外部商业化收入增速进一步加速至40%，创下近年新高。其中，AI相关产品收入达89.71亿元，连续第11个季度实现三位数同比增长，占外部收入比重首次突破30%。截至2026年3月，百炼平台的客户数量同比增长了8倍，反映出企业级市场对AI需求的加速释放。<

news.snippet: 2026年5月13日，全球智能康复与机器人技术峰会（GReAT 2026）在上海张江机器人谷举行。本次大会以“无界关怀：突破康复边界，走向真实应用”为主题，汇聚了近百位来自全球临床康复与机器人领域的顶尖专家、行业领袖与合作伙伴，围绕机器人技术、人工智能与物联护理系统等前沿方向展开深入交流，探

news.title: BMJ独家牵手氢离子，阿里健康开启国际顶刊合作起点
news.snippet: 2026年5月13日，阿里健康在杭正式发布医学AI“氢离子”，同时宣布氢离子与英国BMJ集团（BMJ Group）达成期刊内容独家合作。这项合作标志着阿里健康与国际顶级期刊开启合作的起点。氢离子透露，目前正与全球多家顶刊进行合作沟通。发布会上，阿里健康表示，氢

news.title: 超600个海外新品牌赶来参加天猫618，“精细养护”成入华新风口
news.snippet: 中国市场依然是全球品牌寻求确定性增长的“必争之地”。数据显示，今年618前，来自全球29个国家和地区的超过600个海外新品牌，在天猫国际开出首店。美国、韩国、日本、法国、澳大利亚是入驻新品牌数量最多的五个国家。区别于早期跨国品牌“大单品、广覆盖”的模式，这批海外新品牌呈现出一种新的商业逻辑：告别泛需求，瞄准具体痛点，通过“细分赛道精准卡位”建立壁垒。

news.title: 2 周内第 3 个高危漏洞：Linux 内核再曝 Fragnesia 缺陷，本地用户可提权至 root

news.title: 消息称微软旗下领英将裁员约 5%
news.snippet: IT之家 5 月 14 日消息，据路透社昨日晚间报道，知情人士称，微软旗下领英 LinkedIn 计划裁员 5%。知情人士告诉该媒体，领英计划于当地时间周三通知员工裁员，计划裁员约 5%，目标是重组团队并将人员集中在业务增长领域。领英网站显示，该公司在全球拥有 17,500 多名全职员工。IT之家照此计算，裁员人数大约为 <str
